title: Off the Grid
description: A datapack that allows you to create and move blocks off of their grid
body:
# Off the Grid
This pack lets players move blocks off their grid!

![Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0adcec2f3d6e83ed953c4daebb16500e15611572_0.webp)

# Description:
This is a datapack that allows players to transform blocks into mock-blocks that are able to go off of their grid when moved with the "block hand"

# Notes:
- Currently this pack does not support different types of hitboxes meaning that with any block other than a full block like a slab their may be collision where their shouldn't be
- On non-whole blocks you may see a shulkers head as shulkers is what's used to create something for the player to stand on but you can not make shulkers heads invisible
